Uncertainty increases with longer horizons due to unpredictable political developments, but even at 3 months out, the probability remains low given the extreme threshold.

The last known 30-day average as of Oct 16, 2025 was 11.25. For 2025-11-02 (7 days horizon), there is very little time for deviation from trend, so probability remains close to base rate at 0.28. For 2025-11-25 (~30 days horizon), there is more opportunity for events to shift, adjusted to 0.31. For 2026-01-24 (~3 months horizon), uncertainty is much higher - while conflict continues, specific timing is unpredictable, so probability moves toward 0.5 at 0.48.
